provenance.source: high-confidence review threads, applied before merge

findings.description: Prompt cache stabilization can drop steering/tool-choice steps, so forced tool steering is lost when cache stabilization remains enabled.
Thinking/model tuning disables forced tool choice while still leaving active tools available, allowing the model to skip the intended forced service call.
Subagent invocations must receive the governed provider profile so parent and subagent model behavior stay consistent.
Duplicate groups beyond the first page must remain reachable; truncating at 200 without pagination makes later groups unretrievable.
Duplicate-name normalization must preserve non-Latin letters; ASCII-only stripping can erase names and skip valid duplicate groups.
